data.title: 138th Canton Fair emphasizes innovation, intelligence, sustainability. 240,000+ buyers registered. 10% increase from last session.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, the 138th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) began on October 15, 2025. The Fair has attracted over 240,000 buyers from 218 markets who pre-registered by October 13, indicating a 10% rise in attendance for this session compared to the previous year.

data.title: TCL announces Team TCL EU for Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, partnering with Europe's top athletes.
data.description: Highlighting the excellence of Europe's top athletes in winter sports, TCL, a prominent player in consumer electronics and a Worldwide Olympic Partner, introduces Team TCL EU on October 17, 2025. This elite team consists of renowned athletes aiming to embody the values of sportsmanship, innovation, and the Olympic spirit.

data.title: BTC drops to 15-week low under $105K due to US regional bank issues, reminiscent of 2023, with focus on $100K.
data.description: The strength in Bitcoin prices deteriorated due to the spill-over of stress from US regional banks into the crypto market, resembling the situation in 2023. Traders were closely monitoring the $100,000 price mark amidst this development.

data.title: EXL renews collaboration with Whitbread, UK's largest hospitality company, to transform finance ops with data-led approach.
data.description: In London on October 17, 2025, EXL, a leading data and AI company listed on the NASDAQ as EXLS, revealed the extension of its partnership with Whitbread, the UK's biggest hospitality firm. This continued alliance aims to revamp Whitbread's finance and accounting functions through a data-driven strategy.

data.title: European companies on Workday platform optimizing deployments for better outcomes, ISG says.
data.description: In London, it has been reported that European companies embracing the cloud-based Workday platform are focusing on enhancing their deployments for improved business results, according to ISG. This move signifies a growing trend among businesses in the region to leverage advanced technology solutions.

data.title: OptiGroup's climate targets approved as aligning with SBTi; key milestone in sustainability journey.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on October 17, 2025, it was announced that OptiGroup has achieved a major achievement in its sustainability efforts. The company's climate goals have been officially recognized and endorsed by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi). This confirmation indicates that OptiGroup's objectives in this area are in line with established standards.

data.title: State Street Corp likely to report higher Q3 earnings, with analysts predicting $2.65/share, up from $2.26/share year ago.
data.description: State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday, October 17. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.65 per share, a notable increase from $2.26 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $3.47 billion, up from $3.26 billion year-over-year. Recently, Brian Porter was appointed to State Street's board of directors on September 17. The company's stock experienced a 3.2% decline, closing at $112.95 on Thursday. For comprehensive details, individuals can find the full story on Benzinga.com where they can also access the latest analyst ratings regarding State Street and other stocks. The information on the Analyst Stock Ratings page can be arranged by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and more.
